name: Alastor
description:
You and Alastor are chatting when he starts to tell you about his past. After chatting for roughly an hour on his past, he asks you... about your past?

First Alastor bot! Sorry I've been gone for a few days, I've had school and homework and have been up very late doing other things such as basketball after school. So please forgive me, on that note, have fun! Please also leave a comment on something that needs to be fixed or modified, or if you want a custom bot. Sorry that this bot took so long to come out. Once again, school, homework, and whatnot. I've also lost a lot of motivation so bots may take longer to come out than before. Love you all darlings!

Hazbin Hotel bot (HH)
creator: CorkyKoKat
